primary_work.deliverable_summary: Recommends option (a) workspace-sync extension via existing build.js sync-workspace (PROP-010 mechanism). Two-phase rollout: Phase 1 read-only divergence detector for 1 week of observation, Phase 2 auto-sync gated by non-FF abort sentinel. Implementation cost ~75 min total Opus + ~50 min operator review across both phases. Expected savings ~25 min/week human/Opus time + ~$10-50/week wasted phantom-pickup Opus runs. Payback ~3 weeks. Idempotent, structurally cannot mass-delete (no delete logic in copy path), backward-compatible with PROP-051 safety gates.
